---
title: 'Freedom'
date: '2023-12-25T06:00:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Kaylee Debra Wolfe - Journal'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8575875418359717193'
blogger_filename: '/2023/12/freedom.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Kaylee Debra Wolfe - Journal/feed.atom'
---

<p>&nbsp;Kaylee,</p><p>You've been out of Billie's house for almost a year now, and living with Debbie/Grammie.&nbsp;</p><p>I'm so sorry your life has been so hard, and I wish you had been with us instead. I don't know why it didn't work out that way, but maybe after loosing your parents, it would have been too hard for you to get that close to Flavia and loose her too? I don't know.&nbsp;</p><p>I know how hard it is, now, becoming an adult with so much trauma behind you.&nbsp;</p><p>I'm proud of you. I want you to know that. I wish I could have done more, but I was broken too. Just a broken human, trying to do and be better.&nbsp;</p><p>May the Shalom that passes understanding find you in your adult years, and may you know Shalom himself.&nbsp;</p><p>Darrell</p>
